titleStmt.title: SII 6.113: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 113. (A.R. No. 154-A of 1897). ON THE OTHER SIDE OF THE SAME STONE. At the top of the stone a few lines are lost. The inscription seems to be a continuation of number.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
catussa
Antanibaru daṇḍanāyakaru sama baṁdu
yī managaḷali¨rddu dēvarige taṁtamma ka¨rmmāntarada besaṁ
gaḷaṁ māḍi mū(ṁ)nū¨rvvaru sānigaruṁ . mūnū¨rvvarayyaṇi
garuṁ nibandhakāṟaruṁ sukhavi¨rpparu . Anibaroḷagō[¨rvva]rī dha¨rmmakku
padravaṁgaḷaṁ māḍidavara narasugaḷuṁ . vūrugaḷuṁ nivārisi kaḷavaru .
śāsanama¨ryyādeya bhūmiya sōnigaruṇbaru . mēlāda catussī
meya bhūmiyellamaṁ teṟedallipuṭṭida¨rtthadalu parisūtradoḷa
gaṇa dēvālayaṁgaḷaṁ māḍisutta . Anantasarōvarada . keṟeya ma
ṇna kaḷavutta kaṭṭisuttami¨rpparu . © Ī dha¨rmmamaṁ svadha¨rmmadiṁ pratipāḷisi
davaru kurukṣētraṁ bāṇarāśi gaṁge prayāge na¨rmmade gōdāvarī tīraṁ
modalāgi Anantānantatī¨rtthaṁgaḷalu catu¨rvvēdapāraga¨rgge . catu[¨r*]vvidhadānaṁ
gaḷaṁ koṭṭu sāyira kavileya kōḍuṁ koḷaginalu paṁcaratnaṁgaḷaṁ tīvi dānaṁ
māḍida phaḷamaneyduvaru . Ī dha¨rmmakkanyāyamaṁ cintisidavaru .
paṟageṇisida puṇyanadigaḷalanibaru brāhmaṇarumaṁnnanitu kavileyu
nīkattigeyalaḷidu pāpamanupā[¨r*]jjisikoṇḍānēḷeneya narakakke gaḷagaḷaniḷiva .
[©] sāsanavidāvu (.) delliya sāsana (.) mārittarēke salisuve nānī sāsana
naṁbāpātakanā sakaḷaṁ (.) kāravakke gaḷagaḷaniḷigu . © rāyadēvēṁdraṁ
śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvaruṁ . dānavinōdaṁ ḍaṇḍanāyakacūḍāmaṇi
Anantapāḷanuṁ sukhavi¨rkke kaḷpāyuvara . Avara kī¨rttanayaṁ baradaṁ
sandhivigrahi pā¨rśvanāthana tanayaṁ śāntināthaṁ . kaṇḍarisidaṁ ba¨rmmōjana
magaṁ guṇḍōja . maṁgaḷa mahāśrīyuṁ jayaśrīyumappu
da¨rkkanavarataṁ ©
Digital edition of SII 6.113 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
